info.title: Food Allergen Checker API
info.description: Food Allergen Checker API. Scan ingredients for 16 major allergens including gluten, dairy, nuts, soy, shellfish, and more. Send a JSON POST request through api.market and receive a structured JSON response. Pricing, quotas, and authentication are handled by api.market plans.

post.description: Scan ingredients for 16 major allergens including gluten, dairy, nuts, soy, shellfish, and more.

200.description: Successful JSON response from the API.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded for the current plan.
